name: CloudCampaign
description:
What CloudCampaign Does

CloudCampaign is a social media management platform built for growing agencies and freelancers. The platform helps agencies manage clients, online campaigns, and website content. Agency users can store digital assets in a centralized repository.

CloudCampaign also enables managers to calculate return on investments (ROIs) and track various cost metrics.

Key Features

CloudCampaign offers features for white labeling and other related business activities. These include: 

  • White Label featuressome text
    • Rebrand with your company logo
    • Customize with your brand URLs and colors
    • Enable branded chats for customer support 
    • Brand your reports and documents 
  • With CloudCampaign, you can store your, digital assets in a centralized repository
  • Explore the content library to expedite and improve your content management. 
  • CloudCampaign offers analytics and custom reports.
  • Admin users can schedule social media posts and add blogs. 
  • CloudCampaign facilitates integration with various third-party platforms.
  •  Calculate the return on investments (ROIs) of your marketing campaigns and gain insights into cost metrics.

Benefits of CloudCampaign

  • White label benefits:some text
    • You can fully customize the software with your business logo, URLs, and customized colors
    • Generate in-depth white-labeled social media reports.
    • Post multi-platform content and create automated evergreen content posting campaigns.
    • Use the branded chat service for chat support.
  • Develop social media content with available tools for creation and automated importing.
  • Effective workflows for interactive client content approvals
  • Respond directly to messages from within the platform

Pricing

The three available plans are: 

  • Freelancer: USD 41 / month
  • Studio: USD 191 / month
  • Agency: USD 291 / month  

Pros

✅White label features

✅Branded chat service

✅Calcualtion of cost metrics 

Cons

🚫Minor technical glitches with some features

🚫Outdated interface
